requirement_topic.en: BESS Fire Safety Installation — Georgia Local Fire and Building Authority Requirements and IEC/EN Fire-Safety Standards
requirement_topic.zh: BESS消防安全安装——格鲁吉亚地方消防及建筑主管机关要求与IEC/EN消防安全标准
requirement_topic.zht: BESS消防安全安裝——喬治亞地方消防及建築主管機關要求與IEC/EN消防安全標準

summary.en: In Georgia, fire safety for commercial and industrial facilities — including stationary BESS installations — is regulated under Georgian law and enforced by local fire and building safety authorities. Georgia does not yet have a confirmed dedicated technical regulation specifically for stationary BESS fire safety equivalent to a formally adopted NFPA 855 or EN equivalent. Georgia's DCFTA alignment trajectory means that EN and IEC technical standards are the expected reference framework for fire-safety design documentation, particularly IEC 62933-5-1:2024 (Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety considerations — Hazard identification, risk assessment and risk mitigation) and IEC 62619 (cell/module safety). In the absence of a confirmed BESS-specific Georgian fire code, project-level fire-safety design is expected to reference IEC/EN standards acceptable to the local fire authority and building permit authority. This is a high-priority gap requiring direct verification with the relevant local fire authority and building authority before project design is finalised. BESS project developers and EPCs should engage a locally licensed fire protection engineer or safety consultant familiar with Georgian building and fire codes to determine the applicable design requirements and approval pathway.
summary.zh: 在格鲁吉亚，商业及工业设施（包括固定式BESS装置）的消防安全依据格鲁吉亚法律受到监管，由地方消防及建筑安全主管机关执行。格鲁吉亚尚无经确认的专门针对固定式BESS消防安全的技术法规，与正式采纳的NFPA 855或EN等效规范相当。格鲁吉亚的DCFTA对接轨迹意味着EN和IEC技术标准是消防安全设计文件的预期参考框架，特别是IEC 62933-5-1:2024（电化学储能系统——安全考量——危害识别、风险评估和风险缓解）和IEC 62619（电芯/模组安全）。在缺乏经确认的格鲁吉亚BESS专项消防规范的情况下，项目级消防安全设计预计将引用地方消防主管机关和建筑许可主管机关可接受的IEC/EN标准。这是一个高优先级差距，须在项目设计最终确定前直接向相关地方消防主管机关和建筑主管机关核实。BESS项目开发商和EPC承包商应聘请熟悉格鲁吉亚建筑和消防规范的持牌本地消防工程师或安全顾问，以确定适用的设计要求和审批路径。
summary.zht: 在喬治亞，商業及工業設施（包括固定式BESS裝置）的消防安全依據喬治亞法律受到監管，由地方消防及建築安全主管機關執行。喬治亞尚無經確認的專門針對固定式BESS消防安全的技術法規，與正式採納的NFPA 855或EN等效規範相當。喬治亞的DCFTA對接軌跡意味著EN和IEC技術標準是消防安全設計文件的預期參考框架，特別是IEC 62933-5-1:2024（電化學儲能系統——安全考量——危害識別、風險評估和風險緩解）和IEC 62619（電芯/模組安全）。在缺乏經確認的喬治亞BESS專項消防規範的情況下，項目級消防安全設計預計將引用地方消防主管機關和建築許可主管機關可接受的IEC/EN標準。這是一個高優先級差距，須在項目設計最終確定前直接向相關地方消防主管機關和建築主管機關核實。BESS項目開發商和EPC承包商應聘請熟悉喬治亞建築和消防規範的持牌本地消防工程師或安全顧問，以確定適用的設計要求和審批路徑。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62933-5-1:2024 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety considerations — Hazard identification, risk assessment and risk mitigation (expected IEC/EN reference for BESS fire-safety design under Georgia's DCFTA alignment)
IEC 62619:2022 — Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications (cell/module safety baseline expected in project specifications)

Georgian local fire authority and building permit authority — fire-safety design approval and installation permit required before commissioning; no confirmed BESS-specific Georgian technical regulation as of dataset date — verify directly with local authority
IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems (system-level safety reference expected in project specifications)

summary.en: China manages BESS fire safety under a combination of mandatory standards and project-level fire-safety review. GB 44240-2024 (effective August 1, 2025) includes fire-safety provisions for BESS cells and modules. GB/T 36558-2023 covers system-level safety including fire-related requirements. Project-level fire-safety review in China is governed by local fire authority approval procedures. These Chinese fire-safety standards and domestic approval procedures are not recognised by Georgian authorities as equivalent to IEC/EN-based fire-safety design requirements under Georgia's DCFTA alignment. BESS fire-safety evidence prepared under Chinese standards must be supplemented with IEC/EN-aligned design documentation for Georgian local fire authority and building permit review.
summary.zh: 中国通过强制性标准和项目级消防审查相结合的方式管理BESS消防安全。GB 44240-2024（2025年8月1日起施行）包含BESS电芯和模组的消防安全规定。GB/T 36558-2023覆盖包括消防相关要求在内的系统级安全。中国的项目级消防审查由地方消防主管机关审批程序管控。上述中国消防安全标准和国内审批程序不被格鲁吉亚主管机关认可为在格鲁吉亚DCFTA对接框架下与IEC/EN消防安全设计要求等效。依据中国标准准备的BESS消防安全证据，须在格鲁吉亚地方消防主管机关和建筑许可审查中补充符合IEC/EN要求的设计文件。
summary.zht: 中國通過強制性標準和項目級消防審查相結合的方式管理BESS消防安全。GB 44240-2024（2025年8月1日起施行）包含BESS電芯和模組的消防安全規定。GB/T 36558-2023覆蓋包括消防相關要求在內的系統級安全。中國的項目級消防審查由地方消防主管機關審批程序管控。上述中國消防安全標準和國內審批程序不被喬治亞主管機關認可為在喬治亞DCFTA對接框架下與IEC/EN消防安全設計要求等效。依據中國標準準備的BESS消防安全證據，須在喬治亞地方消防主管機關和建築許可審查中補充符合IEC/EN要求的設計文件。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (includes fire-safety provisions for BESS cells/modules; mandatory, effective August 1, 2025)
GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems)

gap.en: Gap: Georgian local fire and building authorities require fire-safety design approval and installation permits before BESS commissioning. Chinese BESS fire-safety documentation based on GB standards is not accepted as equivalent to IEC/EN-based requirements under Georgia's DCFTA alignment trajectory. No dedicated Georgian technical regulation specifically for stationary BESS fire safety has been confirmed as of the dataset date — this is a high-priority gap. Exporters and project teams should: (a) engage the relevant Georgian local fire authority and building permit authority at the earliest project stage to confirm applicable fire-safety standards and the approval pathway; (b) prepare BESS fire-safety design documentation aligned with IEC 62933-5-1 and IEC 62619 — including thermal-runaway propagation mitigation, gas detection or ventilation design, suppression system design, emergency shutdown procedures, and separation distances; (c) engage a locally licensed fire protection engineer or safety consultant familiar with Georgian building and fire codes; (d) do NOT assume EAC/TR CU or GOST-R fire-safety certificates are relevant — Georgia is not an EAEU member and such certificates are not recognised.
gap.zh: 差距：格鲁吉亚地方消防及建筑主管机关在BESS投运前须批准消防安全设计并颁发安装许可证。依据GB标准编制的中国BESS消防安全文件在格鲁吉亚DCFTA对接轨迹下不被接受为与IEC/EN要求等效。截至本数据集日期，尚未确认格鲁吉亚发布专门针对固定式BESS消防安全的技术法规——这是一个高优先级差距。出口商和项目团队应：（a）在项目最早阶段与格鲁吉亚相关地方消防主管机关和建筑许可主管机关接触，确认适用消防安全标准和审批路径；（b）准备符合IEC 62933-5-1和IEC 62619的BESS消防安全设计文件——包括热失控蔓延缓解、气体探测或通风设计、抑制系统设计、紧急停机程序及隔离距离；（c）聘请熟悉格鲁吉亚建筑和消防规范的持牌本地消防工程师或安全顾问；（d）不得假设EAC/TR CU或GOST-R消防安全证书具有相关性——格鲁吉亚非欧亚经济联盟成员，此类证书不被认可。
gap.zht: 差距：喬治亞地方消防及建築主管機關在BESS投運前須批准消防安全設計並頒發安裝許可證。依據GB標準編制的中國BESS消防安全文件在喬治亞DCFTA對接軌跡下不被接受為與IEC/EN要求等效。截至本數據集日期，尚未確認喬治亞發布專門針對固定式BESS消防安全的技術法規——這是一個高優先級差距。出口商和項目團隊應：（a）在項目最早階段與喬治亞相關地方消防主管機關和建築許可主管機關接觸，確認適用消防安全標準和審批路徑；（b）準備符合IEC 62933-5-1和IEC 62619的BESS消防安全設計文件——包括熱失控蔓延緩解、氣體探測或通風設計、抑制系統設計、緊急停機程序及隔離距離；（c）聘請熟悉喬治亞建築和消防規範的持牌本地消防工程師或安全顧問；（d）不得假設EAC/TR CU或GOST-R消防安全證書具有相關性——喬治亞非歐亞經濟聯盟成員，此類證書不被認可。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — local fire authority design approval and building/installation permit required before BESS commissioning in Georgia; no confirmed dedicated BESS-specific Georgian fire technical regulation as of dataset date — verify directly with local fire and building authority
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or project-specific depending on Chinese project approval, installation type, and local fire authority requirements

source.publisher: International Electrotechnical Commission (IEC) — IEC 62933-5-1:2024 (applicable IEC reference for Georgia BESS fire-safety design under DCFTA alignment)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Local fire and building authority approval is a mandatory installation gate for commercial and industrial BESS in Georgia. Chinese GB-standard fire-safety documentation does not satisfy Georgia's IEC/EN-aligned requirements. Engage the relevant Georgian fire and building authority and a locally licensed fire protection engineer at the earliest project stage to confirm the applicable fire-safety standard (IEC 62933-5-1 / IEC 62619 baseline expected) and design approval requirements before committing to system layout or equipment specification. Do not rely on EAC/TR CU or GOST-R certificates — not applicable in Georgia.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 地方消防及建筑主管机关审批是格鲁吉亚商业及工业BESS装置的强制安装门槛。中国GB标准消防安全文件不满足格鲁吉亚IEC/EN对接要求。在确定系统布局或设备规格前，应在项目最早阶段与相关格鲁吉亚消防及建筑主管机关及持牌本地消防工程师接触，确认适用消防安全标准（预期基准为IEC 62933-5-1 / IEC 62619）及设计审批要求。请勿依赖EAC/TR CU或GOST-R证书——在格鲁吉亚不适用。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 地方消防及建築主管機關審批是喬治亞商業及工業BESS裝置的強制安裝門檻。中國GB標準消防安全文件不滿足喬治亞IEC/EN對接要求。在確定系統布局或設備規格前，應在項目最早階段與相關喬治亞消防及建築主管機關及持牌本地消防工程師接觸，確認適用消防安全標準（預期基準為IEC 62933-5-1 / IEC 62619）及設計審批要求。請勿依賴EAC/TR CU或GOST-R證書——在喬治亞不適用。
